title: SR 16-12: Supervisory Letter SR 16-12 on Interagency Guidance on the New Accounting Standard on Financial Instruments – Credit Losses -- June 17, 2016
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 16-12 on Interagency Guidance on the New Accounting Standard on Financial Instruments – Credit Losses -- June 17, 2016
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 16-12
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to all Federal Reserve supervised financial institutions, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets, that file regulatory reports prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP).
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 16-12 Supervisory Letter SR 16-12 on Interagency Guidance on the New Accounting Standard on Financial Instruments – Credit Losses -- June 17, 2016 This guidance applies to all Federal Reserve supervised financial institutions, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets, that file regulatory reports prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP). BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
